behavior_summary: U8P_OAKTBLEW::look is a U8P_OAKTBLEW::look/examine handler for the NPC/object OAKTBLEW. When the player uses the Look action on this entity, the process emits a single short bark: "table".

Immediately after emitting the bark the process issues a suspend/yield. The suspend likely pauses the U8P_OAKTBLEW::look process to allow the text to be shown; exact wake conditions are not present in the excerpt.
There are no dialogue menus, branching, global flag reads/writes, or external function calls observed in the provided fragment — the behavior is minimal and linear.
notable_control_flow: Simple linear sequence: process entry (U8P_OAKTBLEW::look trigger) -> Bark("table") -> suspend/yield.
No conditional branches, Ask/Menu/strcmp logic, or calls to other game systems are present in the excerpt.
open_questions: What the suspend is waiting for (time, player input, or engine cleanup) is not explicit and must be inferred from engine conventions.
Whether other processes or scripts augment OAKTBLEW's behavior elsewhere (e.g., enterFastArea/leaveFastArea, or other process types) is not known from this fragment.
Are there additional localized strings or alternate U8P_OAKTBLEW::look responses in other localization or script fragments for this entity?
